backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two implemented features: reordering App.tsx sections so GSTServicesSection appears last, and reducing GSTServicesSection.tsx to a minimal 3-card presentation.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files describing their purpose and key implementation details for the Luminia Group luxury corporate website.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS setup with OKLCH CSS custom properties defining light and dark theme color tokens for backgrounds, foregrounds, borders, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Luminia Group React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes the full page layout: WelcomePopup, Navigation, HeroSection, ManifestoSection, brand sections (AssuredTours, LuminiaCaptures, LuminiaTechLabs, ComingSoon, GSTServices), and Footer.
frontend/src/components/AssuredToursSect: Full-width section for Assured Tours & Travels featuring a darkened banner image, overlay heading, italic description, and a 6-card services grid with scroll-triggered fade-in animations in the gold/obsidian luxury theme.
frontend/src/components/ComingSoonSectio: Section showcasing three upcoming Luminia brands (Gadgets, Moda Vestra, Velocity Vogue) as cards with icons, taglines, and descriptions, with scroll-animated entrance effects.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Premium footer with the Luminia logo, portfolio brand list, and contact links (email and WhatsApp), styled in gold/obsidian with a caffeine.ai attribution and dynamic year.
frontend/src/components/GSTServicesSecti: Renders a scroll-animated section for Luminia Group's GST financial services, featuring a dimmed banner image header and a 3-card grid displaying GST Registration, GST Filing, and Tax Consulting.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section for the Luminia Group site with a background image, gold-toned branding, tagline, and a CTA button that smooth-scrolls to the subsidiaries section.
frontend/src/components/LuminiaCapturesS: Scroll-animated section showcasing Luminia Captures' photography and media services across six categories (wedding, video, events, studio, fashion, real estate) with a banner image and service cards.
frontend/src/components/LuminiaTechLabsS: Scroll-animated section for Luminia TechLabs presenting six technology service offerings (web, mobile, UI/UX, blockchain, AI, cloud) with a banner image header and descriptive service cards.
frontend/src/components/ManifestoSection: Displays a scroll-animated manifesto section with a branded blockquote, decorative gold dividers, and a three-stat row (7 subsidiaries, ∞ ambition, 1 vision) for the Luminia Group.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with smooth-scroll links to page sections, a scroll-aware background blur effect, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu.
A 'Coming Soon' full-screen placeholder page with animated fade-in, gold decorative elements, and a Luminia Group logo.
frontend/src/components/SubsidiaryDetail: A modal overlay that displays detailed information and an image carousel for a selected Luminia subsidiary, with keyboard navigation and animated entrance/exit transitions.
frontend/src/components/SubsidiaryGrid.t: Defines the list of Luminia subsidiaries and renders them as a scroll-animated grid, opening a SubsidiaryDetails modal on selection.
frontend/src/components/WelcomePopup.tsx: A full-screen welcome splash shown once per session, featuring animated falling gold particles, staggered headline letter reveals, and a ripple-effect enter button.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an Internet Computer actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module with no implementation, indicating no backend queries are needed for this static site.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollAnimation.ts: Custom hook that uses IntersectionObserver to track when a referenced element enters the viewport, returning a visibility boolean for scroll-triggered animations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining CSS custom properties for a dark gold/obsidian luxury theme, Tailwind directives, scrollbar styling, and keyframe animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the App component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom gold/obsidian/ivory color palettes, Cormorant Garamond fonts, zero border radii, luxury box shadows, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing a multi-brand website with completed features to reorder and minimize the GST Services section to appear last with at most 3 concise service cards.
